states.name: MoveTo(λ_choose_overlap_side(), True)
states.description: Move to overlapping position, either left or right at about 40 degrees and 8 meters from ball, to receive pass from teammate

states.name: StopAndReceiveBall()
states.description: Stop to receive the ball from teammate after pass

states.name: Pass('teammate')
states.description: Pass to your teammate who is advancing towards goal

transitions.description: Wait until teammate passes the ball
Pause momentarily to clearly separate ball reception and next action
Wait until you get ball possession
Wait until teammate moves forward towards goal
Wait until teammate passes towards goal
